description: Chat page — a conversational AI interface where users plan features with Claude and generate executable workflows from natural-language discussions. Covers both the /chat landing page and /chat/[id] active session page.

groups.description: The Chat page is a conversational AI interface for planning and prototyping automation workflows. Users start a new chat session with Claude, have a free-form conversation to plan features, discuss architecture, brainstorm ideas, or ask questions, and then generate an executable multi-phase workflow directly from the conversation. The page has two views: a landing page (/chat) for starting new sessions, and an active session view (/chat/[id]) with a split-panel layout for chatting and previewing generated workflows side-by-side.
groups.name: Page Purpose

assertions.description: Required element 0 for state Landing Page Structure
assertions.precondition: User is on the /chat landing page

target.label: Required element for Landing Page Structure

states.description: The Chat page is a conversational AI interface for planning and prototyping automation workflows. Users start a new chat session with Claude, have a free-form conversation to plan features, discuss architecture, brainstorm ideas, or ask questions, and then generate an executable multi-phase workflow directly from the conversation. The page has two views: a landing page (/chat) for starting new sessions, and an active session view (/chat/[id]) with a split-panel layout for chatting and previewing generated workflows side-by-side.
